name: checker

metadata.notes: Validator strictly parses tokens, enforces 1â‰¤x,qâ‰¤4e5, 0â‰¤a_iâ‰¤1e9, 1â‰¤Kâ‰¤1e9, and exact operation count. Checker implements dual-branch verification: YES branch checks bijection, slot bounds, and modulo constraints; NO branch verifies 0â‰¤Lâ‰¤R<K, strict Hall violation (coverage count < length), and lexicographical minimality via bounded brute-force (Kâ‰¤2000) to avoid TLE while preserving correctness guarantees. Test generator covers 5 buckets: basic_small (samples + trivial), boundary_values (x=1, max x, max a_i), random_mixed (balanced ops), adversarial_hall (crafted gaps), performance_large (max q, large K, sum K constraint). expect_oracle=True for Kâ‰¤50 cases, False otherwise. All tools use only stdlib, avoid I/O, and maintain strict separation of concerns.
